columns.extraction_plan: On page 3, in the "Study Assessments" paragraph under the "METHODS" section, the text states: "Secondary efficacy end points included... time to worsening of disease-related physical symptoms as measured by the Functional Assessment of Cancer Therapy-Prostate (National Comprehensive Cancer Network) symptom index 17-item questionnaire...". This indicates that an aspect of quality of life (disease-related physical symptoms) was assessed and reported.
